testcase.name: test_revise_mode_inserts_prerequisites

failure.message: AssertionError: reason not about weakness: Standard progression from baseline. assert ('weak' in 'standard progression from baseline.' or 'prerequisite' in 'standard progression from baseline.' or 'hint' in 'standard progression from baseline.')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3.py:294: in test_revise_mode_inserts_prerequisites assert ("weak" in reason) or ("prerequisite" in reason) or ("hint" in reason), \ E AssertionError: reason not about weakness: Standard progression from baseline. E assert ('weak' in 'standard progression from baseline.' or 'prerequisite' in 'standard progression from baseline.' or 'hint' in 'standard progression from baseline.')

testcase.name: test_advance_mode_after_strong_feedback

failure.message: AssertionError: expected advance; got: {'id': '71e7e719-bdcb-4c64-8c8c-fab2ebafb287', 'user_id': '8bbb8ac1-cfa8-43ff-834c-9d5e8e790d9e', 'for_date': '2026-07-21', 'reason': 'Standard progression from baseline.', 'detected_weaknesses': [], 'inserted_prerequisites': [], 'advance': False, 'created_at': '2026-07-21T17:21:39.043675+00:00'} assert (False is True or 'advance' in 'standard progression from baseline.' or 'strong' in 'standard progression from baseline.') + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95954a0f440>('advance') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95954a0f440> = {'id': '71e7e719-bdcb-4c64-8c8c-fab2ebafb287', 'user_id': '8bbb8ac1-cfa8-43ff-834c-9d5e8e790d9e', 'for_date': '2026-07-21', 'reason': 'Standard progression from baseline.', ...}.get + and 'standard progression from baseline.' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10> = 'Standard progression from baseline.'.lower + and 'standard progression from baseline.' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10> = 'Standard progression from baseline.'.lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3.py:336: in test_advance_mode_after_strong_feedback assert adj.get("advance") is True or "advance" in adj["reason"].lower() or "strong" in adj["reason"].lower(), \ E AssertionError: expected advance; got: {'id': '71e7e719-bdcb-4c64-8c8c-fab2ebafb287', 'user_id': '8bbb8ac1-cfa8-43ff-834c-9d5e8e790d9e', 'for_date': '2026-07-21', 'reason': 'Standard progression from baseline.', 'detected_weaknesses': [], 'inserted_prerequisites': [], 'advance': False, 'created_at': '2026-07-21T17:21:39.043675+00:00'} E assert (False is True or 'advance' in 'standard progression from baseline.' or 'strong' in 'standard progression from baseline.') E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95954a0f440>('advance') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf95954a0f440> = {'id': '71e7e719-bdcb-4c64-8c8c-fab2ebafb287', 'user_id': '8bbb8ac1-cfa8-43ff-834c-9d5e8e790d9e', 'for_date': '2026-07-21', 'reason': 'Standard progression from baseline.', ...}.get E + and 'standard progression from baseline.' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10> = 'Standard progression from baseline.'.lower E + and 'standard progression from baseline.' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf95954a6af10> = 'Standard progression from baseline.'.lower
